commands.name: search
commands.description: Search packages in the gpm registry.

arguments.name: pattern
arguments.description: Filter the available packages by a pattern. E.g. `wolven*` [default: *]

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: The package name. Can be a github repo url, a repo name or in the form of owner/name/id.
